=====Pokémon competitions=====
[[File:Pokémon Teamwork Medal.png|thumb|220px|The Teamwork Medal won in the Pokémon Orienteering]]

* [[Grass Tournament]] - Top 32 (as "Mr. Semaj"; ''[[EP178|The Grass Route]]'')

* [[PokéRinger]]
** [[Crossgate PokéRinger]] - Runner-up (''[[AG080|That's Just Swellow]]'')

* [[Pokémon Dress-Up Contest]] - N/A (''[[DP033|All Dressed Up With Somewhere To Go!]]'')
* [[Pastoria Croagunk Festival]] - N/A (with Jessie; ''[[DP082|Cream of the Croagunk Crop!]]'')
* {{to|Lilypad}} {{pkmn|Contest}} - Winner (as "Jessilina"; ''[[DP146|Dressed for Jess Success!]]''; given to Jessie)
* [[Scalchop King Competition]] - Disqualified (with Jessie as "Jacen" and "Jesty"; ''[[BW126|Crowning the Scalchop King!]]'')
* [[Poké Puff Contest]] - Preliminary round (with Jessie; ''[[XY026|A Battle by Any Other Name!]]'')
* [[Pokémon Sky Relay]] - Disqualified (with Jessie as "Team R"; ''[[XY077|A Relay in the Sky!]]'')
* [[Pokémon Pancake Race]] - Disqualified (''[[SM013|Racing to a Big Event!]]'')
* [[Charjabug race|Charjabug race Koko Cup]] - Disqualified (with Jessie as "Bewear Max"; ''[[SM041|Mounting an Electrifying Charge!]]'')
* [[Alola Bread Festival]] - Unknown (with Jessie and Meowth; ''[[SM072|Sours for the Sweet!]]'')
* [[Vikavolt race|Vikavolt race Fini Cup]] - DNF (as "Road Rocket Racer"; ''[[SM119|A High-Speed Awakening!]]'')
